name: Round-up Beef (for a Crowd)
recipeIngredient: 5 medium onions, chopped (Salt and pepper to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge strips of beef in flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Brown the beef in oil.
3. In a large pot, combine water, catsup, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped onions.
4. Stir well until all ingredients are dissolved.
5. Heat mixture over medium heat until boiling.
6. Pour the liquid mixture over the beef.
7. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
8. Cook covered until the beef is tender (about 2 hours).
9. Stir occasionally during cooking.
10. Serves 20 - 25 and freezes well.
